messages.author: Fra
messages.text: Desktop dashboard for MeshCore mesh radio networks MeshCore Insights connects to a MeshCore companion node via USB serial or Bluetooth (BLE) and provides a real-time dashboard — live node map, messaging, node analysis, remote management, and a debug console. Here is a link to the repository. Feel free to post suggestions and comments. https://github.com/BomBefok/MeshcoreInsights
messages.content_html: Desktop dashboard for MeshCore mesh radio networks MeshCore Insights connects to a MeshCore companion node via USB serial or Bluetooth (BLE) and provides a real-time dashboard — live node map, messaging, node analysis, remote management, and a debug console. Here is a link to the repository. Feel free to post suggestions and comments. https://github.com/BomBefok/MeshcoreInsights
embeds_html:
GitHub - BomBefok/MeshcoreInsights: A Graphical software interface ...
A Graphical software interface to interact with Meshcore companion nodes. - BomBefok/MeshcoreInsights
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Chris
messages.text: This repo link is just rar files and an exe you expect people to blindly install. Repush your source in a non compressed format so it’s readily available per GPL practices, or I’m going to assume there’s malware or scam associated with this app. OP appears to have addresses these concerns, and is now distributing this project as a python code you can review before running. (edited)
